Jack ve Tara Posting Control

Canonical template generated from .agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting. Do not edit this HTML by hand.

Source Of Truth

Before each run, pull or read https://github.com/jackhunterking/jack-ve-tara-codex and load the posting skill plus references fresh.

No downstream panel, plugin, or schedule should keep its own editable handles, platform rules, voice rules, or Turkish rules.

Gate 1

Gate 2

Turkish Canary

çÇ ğĞ ıİ öÖ şŞ üÜ — değil, güzel, şey, çürümüş, gördüğüne

Codex/Atlas: paste from UTF-8 clipboard. Cowork/Claude-in-Chrome: use document.execCommand("insertText", false, TEXT) or UTF-8 clipboard paste. Both must read back and compare exactly before Gate 2.

Local-video uploads should use Atlas desktop control and the native macOS file picker when available. Chrome automation should stay a verification helper for page state and exact text checks.

Hard Stops

Stop on passwords, 2FA, passkeys, CAPTCHAs, account checkpoints, unexpected account switchers, or missing upload permissions.
